pending.title: Setting up your dashboard…
pending.reviewInfo: This usually only takes a moment. If it sticks here for more than a minute, contact support and we'll sort it out.
pending.autoUpdate: This page will refresh automatically once you're set.

suspended.title: Account Suspended
suspended.description: Your business account has been suspended. If you believe this is an error, please contact our support team.

notFound.title: This invitation no longer exists
notFound.body: The link you used is no longer valid. This can happen if the invitation was cancelled or if the link is incomplete.
notFound.contactOwner: Contact the owner or an administrator of the business to have a new invitation sent.

expired.title: This invitation has expired
expired.body: Ask {inviter} to send you a new invitation to join {business}.

alreadyAcceptedByMe.title: You've already joined {business}
alreadyAcceptedByMe.body: This invitation has already been accepted. You can head to the dashboard.

alreadyAcceptedByOther.title: This invitation has already been used
alreadyAcceptedByOther.instructions: If that's your address, sign in with that account. Otherwise, contact the owner of {business} for a new invitation.

emailMismatch.title: Sign in with the right account
emailMismatch.options: To join {business}, you have two options:
emailMismatch.askResend: Ask {inviter} to send a new invitation to your current address.
emailMismatch.orSignInAs: Sign in with the invited address.
emailMismatch.switchAccount: Sign in with the other account

step1.title: You're invited to {business}
step1.subtitle: {inviter} has invited you to join the team.
step1.emailHint: The invitation is tied to this address — it can't be changed.

step2.howToJoin: How would you like to join {business}?

forgotPassword.intro: We'll send a reset link to {email}.
forgotPassword.afterReset: Once your password is reset, come back to this link from your email to join {business}.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: If you don't see it within a minute, check your spam folder.

otp.title: Check your email
otp.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. If you don't see it within a minute, check your spam folder.
otp.label: Verification code

errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load the invitation. Please try again.
errors.acceptFailed: Couldn't accept the invitation. Please try again.
errors.accountExists: An account already exists with this email. Check your password or use "Forgot password".

roleDescriptions.owner: Full access to all features including billing and settings
roleDescriptions.admin: Manage team members and access all business features
roleDescriptions.scanner: Scan customer passes and add stamps via the mobile app

scannerWelcome.setupComplete: You've been set up as a scanner.
scannerWelcome.downloadDescription: Use the Stampeo Scanner app to scan customer passes and add stamps.
scannerWelcome.inDevelopment: The scanner app is currently in development.
scannerWelcome.notified: You'll be notified when it's available.
